name: kotalanol
summary: Thiosugar sulfonium constituent from Salacia known for intestinal alpha-glucosidase inhibition.
description: Kotalanol is a Salacia thiosugar sulfonium studied for inhibiting intestinal alpha-glucosidases, potentially reducing dietary carbohydrate conversion to absorbable monosaccharides.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
